message:
🌱 Add vault: Support for shutting down Vault Agent when Job ends mission (#1000)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "vault-11089-support-for-shutting-down-vault-agent-when-job-ends-possibly-via-htt",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "vault: Support for shutting down Vault Agent when Job ends (possibly via HTTP POST)",
+    "description": "Support for shutting down Vault Agent when Job ends (possibly via HTTP POST). Requested by 40+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current vault setup",
+        "description": "Verify your vault version and configuration:\n```bash\nvault version\n```\nThis feature requires a working vault installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review vault configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant vault configuration:\nWe have several long-running Kubernetes batch/v1 Jobs that require credentials from an injected `vault agent`."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support for shutting down Vault Agent when Job ends…",
+        "description": "We had problems with our Helm jobs (database migrations) and the Vault Agents recently, so we ended up pulling the Vault Agent from the Jobs and replaced it by running a script as our entry point to curl the Vault API and set the necessary variables for our migrations to complete.  This way, our\n```yaml\nenv:\n          - name: VAULT_ROLE\n            value: {{ printf \"%s-%s-%s\" .Values.application.partOf (include \"chart.serviceAccountName\" .) \"migration\" | quote }}\n          - name: VAULT_ADDR\n            value: \"http://vault.vault-system:8200\"\n          - name: REGEX_TOKEN\n            value: \"client_token\\\":\\\"(.*)\\\",\\\"accessor\"\n          - name: REGEX_USER\n            value: \"username\\\":\\\"(.*)\\\"}\"\n          - name: REGEX_PASSWORD\n            value: \"password\\\":\\\"(.*)\\\",\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade vault to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade vault:\n```bash\n# Check current version\nvault version\n# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/hashicorp/vault\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support for shutting down Vault Agent when Job ends…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "We had problems with our Helm jobs (database migrations) and the Vault Agents recently, so we ended up pulling the Vault Agent from the Jobs and replaced it by running a script as our entry point to curl the Vault API and set the necessary variables for our migrations to complete.  This way, our jobs didn't get hung because the sidecar did not shut down.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "env:\n          - name: VAULT_ROLE\n            value: {{ printf \"%s-%s-%s\" .Values.application.partOf (include \"chart.serviceAccountName\" .) \"migration\" | quote }}\n          - name: VAULT_ADDR\n            value: \"http://vault.vault-system:8200\"\n          - name: REGEX_TOKEN\n            value: \"client_token\\\":\\\"(.*)\\\",\\\"accessor\"\n          - name: REGEX_USER\n            value: \"username\\\":\\\"(.*)\\\"}\"\n          - name: REGEX_PASSWORD\n            value: \"password\\\":\\\"(.*)\\\",\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },

+      "vault",
+      "community",

+    ],
